case_title: CACH, LLC VS. CHRISTOPHER B. SUGARMAN

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CACH, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT SUGARMAN, CHRISTOPHER B. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CACH, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MATTER FROM JAN-21-2009 TO FEB-19-2009. OPPOSITION DUE ON OR BEFORE FEB-13-2009. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CONNIE J. PARCHMAN, CSR 6137

OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; MEMORANDUM OF P/A; DECLARATION IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY RESPONDENT SUGARMAN, CHRISTOPHER B.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CACH, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED. CASE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1287.2.(THE COURT ADDS CCP SECTION PERTAINS TO ARBITRATION MATTERS). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CACH, LLC'S Notice of Hearing on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq., Attorney at Law, 801 Fillmore #22, (415) 922-5939; specially appearing for Plaintiff's Counsel, Plaintiff and moving party; Christopher Sugarman, Defendant, in Pro Per, (415) 572-5676, appearing, in opposition; Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Case dismissed pursuant to CCP section 1287.2.(The Court adds CCP section pertains to Arbitration matters). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/PB) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
